word.definition: Fraught describes something that causes or involves a lot of emotional stress or worry. When fraught is used in the phrase “fraught with,” it means “full of something bad or unwanted.”

sports_fact.text: Satchel Paige became MLB's oldest rookie at 42 after two decades of Negro Leagues stardom — and still helped pitch Cleveland to the 1948 pennant.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Clinches Longest Weekly Winning Streak Since 2023
market.summary: Index rises for eighth straight week; Warsh sworn in as Fed chair

quote.text: Every moment of life is to be lived calmly, mindfully, as if it were the last, to insure that the most is made of the precious human state — the only one in which enlightenment is possible. And only the enlightened can recall their former lives; for the rest of us, the memories of past existences are but glints of light, twinges of longing, passing shadows, disturbingly familiar, that are gone before they can be grasped, like the passage of that silver bird on Dhaulagiri.
quote.author: Peter Matthiessen

history.text: Egypt closes the Straits of Tiran to Israeli shipping.
